name: WhatsApp Restaurant Bot - V10 FINAL WIRED DEMO

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.from }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "{{ $json.error_msg || 'An error occurred. Please try again.' }}"}}

parameters.query: SELECT phone, table_number, cart, customer_name, last_seen, preferences, session_started, total_orders FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = $1 ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 1
UPDATE user_sessions SET table_number = $1, last_seen = NOW() WHERE phone = $2 RETURNING *

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.from }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "✅ Table {{ $json.session.table_number }} confirmed!\n\nType MENU to see our menu"}}

parameters.query: SELECT code, name, category, price, description, is_available FROM menu_items WHERE is_available = true ORDER BY category, code

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.from }}", "type": "interactive", "interactive": {{ JSON.stringify($json.interactive) }}}

={"model": "llama3-70b-8192", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You extract food item codes and quantities from user orders. Here is the LIVE MENU DATABASE: {{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => i.json)) }}. Return ONLY a valid JSON array of objects. Example: [{\"code\": \"B1\", \"quantity\": 2}]. Map their natural language requests perfectly to the menu codes. If they ask for an item that is is_available: false, STILL output its code."}, {"role": "user", "content": "{{ $('Sanitize Input').item.json.text || $('Sanitize Input').item.json.action }}"}], "temperature": 0}

parameters.query: SELECT code, name, price, category, is_available FROM menu_items WHERE code = ANY($1::text[])

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.from }}", "type": "interactive", "interactive": {"type": "button", "body": {"text": "{{ $json.cart_text }}"}, "action": {"buttons": [{"type": "reply", "reply": {"id": "confirm", "title": "✅ Confirm Order"}}, {"type": "reply", "reply": {"id": "menu", "title": "➕ Add More"}}]}}}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, table_number, phone, customer_name, items, subtotal, tax, total, status, upi_string, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6, $7, $8, $9, $10, NOW()) RETURNING *

parameters.jsonBody:
={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.from }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "💡 *HELP - Available Commands*

📋 MENU - View full menu
🛒 CART - View your cart
✅ CONFIRM - Place order
❓ HELP - Show this help

*How to order:*
1. Type MENU
2. Send item codes (e.g., B10 A5)
3. Type CART to review
4. Type CONFIRM to place order
5. Pay at counter with order ID

📞 Support: {{ $env.SUPPORT_EMAIL }}"}}

={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $json.execution.error.message ? $json.execution.error.message.split('||')[1] || $env.SUPPORT_PHONE : $env.SUPPORT_PHONE }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "⚠️ Our highly trained monkeys encountered a technical issue! Please try again or contact support."}}

parameters.query: SELECT code, name, is_available FROM menu_items

INSERT INTO menu_items (code, name, category, price, description, is_available) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, category = EXCLUDED.category, price = EXCLUDED.price, description = EXCLUDED.description, is_available = EXCLUDED.is_available
SELECT order_id, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE phone = $1 AND status = 'order_received' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

Your phone number and personal data have been securely erased from our system. Historical order records have been anonymised.\n\nThank you for using {{ $env.RESTAURANT_NAME }}!"}}

parameters.query: SELECT value AS bot_mode FROM settings WHERE key = 'bot_mode' LIMIT 1

WITH cart AS (
  SELECT cart FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = $1
),
item_idx AS (
  SELECT pos - 1 AS idx
  FROM user_sessions, jsonb_array_elements(cart) WITH ORDINALITY arr(item, pos)
  WHERE phone = $1 AND item->>'code' = $2
  LIMIT 1
)
UPDATE user_sessions
SET cart = CASE
  WHEN (SELECT idx FROM item_idx) IS NULL THEN cart  -- item not in cart, skip
  WHEN $3::int <= 0 THEN                              -- remove if qty 0 or negative
    cart - (SELECT idx FROM item_idx)::int
  ELSE                                                -- update quantity
    jsonb_set(cart, ARRAY[(SELECT idx FROM item_idx)::text, 'quantity'], to_jsonb($3::int))
END
WHERE phone = $1
RETURNING cart;

-- Reload last_order ONLY if all items are still available=true
WITH last = (SELECT last_order FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = $1),
unavailable AS (
  SELECT item->>'name' AS name
  FROM jsonb_array_elements((SELECT last_order FROM user_sessions WHERE phone=$1)) AS item
  LEFT JOIN menu_items m ON m.code = item->>'code'
  WHERE m.available = false OR m.code IS NULL
)
UPDATE user_sessions
SET cart = CASE
  WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unavailable) = 0 THEN last_order
  ELSE cart  -- don't overwrite if some items are 86'd
END
WHERE phone = $1
RETURNING cart, (SELECT json_agg(name) FROM unavailable) AS unavailable_items;

BEGIN;
SELECT order_id, status, confirmed_at
FROM orders
WHERE phone = $1
  AND status IN ('order_received', 'preparing')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
FOR UPDATE NOWAIT;  -- NOWAIT: fail immediately if someone else has the lock (cook already bumped)

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'preparing') AS queue_depth,
  (SELECT value::int FROM settings WHERE key = 'avg_prep_minutes') AS avg_prep

SELECT code, type, discount, valid_hours_start, valid_hours_end, valid_days, expiry
FROM promotions
WHERE code = UPPER($1)
  AND active = true
  AND (expiry IS NULL OR expiry >= CURRENT_DATE)
  AND (valid_days IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(NOW() AT TIME ZONE $2, 'Dy') = ANY(valid_days))
  AND (valid_hours_start IS NULL OR
       (NOW() AT TIME ZONE $2)::TIME BETWEEN valid_hours_start AND valid_hours_end)
LIMIT 1

Here's what I heard:
"{{ $json.transcript }}"

Is this correct?"}, "action": {"buttons": [{"type": "reply", "reply": {"id": "CMD_VOICE_YES", "title": "✅ Yes, proceed"}}, {"type": "reply", "reply": {"id": "CMD_VOICE_NO", "title": "❌ No, retype"}}]}}}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO user_sessions (phone, consent_given_at, policy_version, cart)
                VALUES ($1, NOW(), $2, '[]'::jsonb)
                ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE
                SET consent_given_at = NOW(), policy_version = $2
DO UPDATE SET last_inbound_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO message_logs (message_id, phone, direction, channel, created_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, 'inbound', 'whatsapp', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;
SELECT key, value FROM settings;

SELECT 
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE $1)::TIME >= $2::TIME AND 
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE $1)::TIME < $3::TIME AS is_open

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].from }}", "type": "text", "text": {"body": "We're currently closed. We open at {{ $env.OPENING_TIME }}. You can pre-order when we open."}}

parameters.query: SELECT consent_given_at FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = $1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].from }}", "type": "interactive", "interactive": {"type": "button", "body": {"text": "To continue, please agree to our Privacy Policy regarding data storage."}, "action": {"buttons": [{"type": "reply", "reply": {"id": "CMD_AGREE_PRIVACY", "title": "I Agree"}}]}}}

parameters.query:
SELECT count(*) as req_count 
FROM message_logs 
WHERE phone = $1 
AND created_at > (NOW() - INTERVAL '60 seconds');

-- Check active orders before deletion
WITH active AS (
  SELECT count(*) as c FROM orders WHERE phone = $1 AND status IN ('preparing', 'order_received')
)
UPDATE user_sessions 
SET deletion_requested_at = NOW() 
WHERE phone = $1 AND (SELECT c FROM active) = 0;
